title: Gravion Origin
body:
# Gravion
The Gravion are an interdimensional race, existing between planes where gravity flows in all directions. Their control over gravitational forces allows them to defy physics.

## Abilities
Graviton Shift
You harness gravitational forces at the cost of your gravitational stamina.

### Gravitational Stamina
You channel your gravitational stamina to use your abilities.

### Gravitational Domain
You are able to manipulate gravity to create a field that flips nearby entities for 10 seconds.

### Gravitational Slam
Lift your opponents in the air and then slam them down, and stun them for a couple seconds.

### Zero Gravity
You are able to manipulate your own gravity, making yourself lighter or even weightless.

## Positives
### Gravitational Protection
Arrows and other projectiles lose their gravity when they get near you.

### Stable Ground
Immune to knockback effects, maintaining a firm stance on any surface.

## Negatives
### Heavy Appetite
Gravity manipulation drains your energy, making your hunger deplete faster than normal.

### Small
Due to the constant change in gravity, your size has decreased.

### Nether Gravity Sickness
The Nether's gravity messes with your abilities, making your gravity stronger.

### Gravitational Instability
Normal gravity feels unnatural. Staying in "down" gravity weakens you.

### Gravitational Anchor
You cannot swim effectively; water slows you significantly, making rivers and oceans dangerous obstacles.

## Requirements
Appli(https://modrinth.com/mod/appli), Apugli (https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli) and Gravity Changer qouteall fork (https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api-fork).
